Fear Rules Life
When a memory of trauma dictates the ability to
experience joy, ease, freedom, and relationships.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 26 --

Family Problem
Daughter’s accident triggers Mandy’s panic attacks and limit her life.
Mandy feels blamed for her emotions of fear, panic and anxiety.
Systemic Challenge presents. Mandy is her mother’s broken child. Mandy’s mother panics
when she is away from her daughter, and Mandy panics when away from her mother.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 26 --

Tony aligns with Rita (Mandy’s Mom) as a partner instead of making
her the problem. Mom is protecting Mandy from her fear of abuse by
the husband, who has raised his fist towards her.
Tony creates a challenge of a wilderness survival camping trip. The goal
is for Mandy to depend on her man instead of her mom.
Ordeal to bring husband and wife together
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 26 --

Working Together
Instead of pointing out the problems in the family system, Tony aligns
with the grandmother while being truthful with her about her issues and
her power. Then, with her as an ally, he presents the challenge to the
couple. They need to depend on each other to heal the marriage, as well
as Mandy’s anxiety over the children.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 26 --

S
Breaking Destructive
Patterns
Hiking is a new activity. Mandy is
harsh and angry after hiking all day.
Her hiking guide shows her he is
missing a leg and explains what he
overcame. You can see Mandy is
still able to take in his emotions, and
this begins to shift her.
New Challenge: they must get out
of the wilderness by themselves
without their guide. If they can do
this together as a family, they can do
anything.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 6 of 26 --

Purpose of Ordeal
The goal is to create trust between Scott and Mandy.
Mandy feels all her anger and her limit by the end of the day. Notice Mandy is
feeling anger and frustration instead of anxiety and panic.
Reading of (Guide) Craig’s letter
Allows Mandy to take responsibility for her bad emotions and anger towards her
family.
Rafting Trip
One more chance to connect and bond with her husband and show her true self
who can be responsible for her own emotions.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 26 --

S
Rafting Challenge
Breakthrough
Mandy feels what good fear is when going over
water. She understands a different way to use her
emotions. She decides to jump off a very high rock.
She is also now able to kiss and touch her husband.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 8 of 26 --

Scott & Mandy Reunite
Scott tells Mandy that what they have now is stronger than what they
had before the accident. He toasts to the old Mandy being back.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 9 of 26 --

Overcoming the past by seeing
the accident in a new way
The accident now has a new term: a gift. It’s no longer the day
of the accident. Instead it is the day of the gift.
She can go back to helping people.
Huge weight lifted from her no longer stuck on herself.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 26 --

Ambulance Trigger sets off her mom’s panic attack, and Mandy is in charge
of helping her mom. That was the real breakthrough. Then she shows her
daughter where the accident was. She is able to retell the story to her
daughter and is ready to let the kids be kids again.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 12 of 26 --

More than the moment
Learn to deal with fear in a different way.
Something happened in past that impacts how we live today.
Fear of going through emotions again.
Fear is often called stress.
Follow trail of stress leads to ultimate fear.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 26 --

Two Primary Fears
We are not enough
We feel worthless
If I’m not enough I won’t be loved
Scared of love because it could be taken away
We lower our expectations so we aren’t afraid
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 26 --

Becoming More
Emotional Muscle that develops from facing fear
Fear doesn’t run your life anymore
Tony believes you have to do things to figure out fear
You get to know fear and it is less scary
Recondition your mind to get over any fear
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 15 of 26 --

Find what you fear more
If you are afraid of being alone, are you more afraid of being
with someone who abuses you?
The breakthrough moment when you get mad enough etc. that
you do what it is.
Know that fear is just an energy that you are not familiar with
enough - or you’ve given it a label that you are not familiar
with enough.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 16 of 26 --

THE QUESTION
Do you get scared in front of a big crowd?
Bruce Springsteen- 	“I hear first cheers, feel energy that speeds me
up. My heart beats faster, I sweat, then I know I’m ready.
Stage fright (a famous person)
Explains same thing that Bruce explained that gets him ready. They
call it a panic attack.
Fear and Excitement are very close. It is an energy that you can
dance with. That can excite you. It tells you you are ready. The
meaning is in your power.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

What is loss about?
Uncover the truth- Nothing real is never lost
Trauma can be seared into the nervous system of a person
Loss of a family relationships due to trauma or this loss
happened before the trauma
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 20 of 26 --

Trauma
When we experience stress, pain and trauma we lose one thing but
we gain another.
Panic attacks give us connection and attention.
We reinforce negative behaviors unconsciously. We lock into how to
meet our needs. This is why we hang on to our problems.
What do we value more than the pain of our trauma or our problem.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 21 of 26 --

Real Communication
Uncover the truth
Hear what is not being said
Mandy is saying, “show me that you love me even if I’m a
terrible bitch.”
The deeper trauma is that the relationship has been lost

Uncovering the truth about fear- It is excitement (Mandy finds herself

-- 25 of 26 --

Invitation to remember
our deeper truth through
memory
I would like to invite you to remember yourself. A part of you that
you may have forgotten. A part of you that is very strong, whole and
full. Now you may see or feel or experience moments, times in your
life now as this strong you. Do you see this play out like a movie? Or
do you feel them from the inside of your experience? Give yourself a
moment. You can give yourself permission to remember this time of
great strength/freedom in you whenever you like. Was it Joy?
Freedom? Lightness? Love? Connection? Peace? You can give
yourself this gift often. These enjoyable truths of who you are will
surprise you. They will appear out of no where, like a messenger.
Allow them to fill you. Allow yourself to watch or feel them. Then
move on with your day and what you do.
Magali’s approach for those ready for
a deeper journey of self healing and
understanding.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
